sourceProfile.title: Source profile
sourceProfile.description: Instagram handle to use as the source network.

limit.title: Result limit
limit.description: Maximum number of profiles to emit.

seedProfiles.title: Seed profiles
seedProfiles.description: Optional handles to scrape directly while custom follower/following collection is being developed or tested.

sessionCookie.title: Session cookie
sessionCookie.description: Optional Instagram cookie string for accounts you are authorized to access. Store as a secret in Apify.
